subcodes.first_line: O Jamálu'd-Dín! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the True and Manifest King! Thy letters, which thou didst dispatch to the Greater Branch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال الدین علیک بهاء الله الملک الحق المبین نامهای شما که ارسال نمودی غصن اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @review of publications, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
